message:
bench: add BloomFilter and CountingBloomFilter Criterion benchmarks

4 bench functions covering the bloom_filter hot-path operations:
- insert throughput at 1K/10K/100K capacities
- contains hit path (5K lookups against populated filter)
- contains miss path (5K lookups against absent keys)
- CountingBloomFilter insert+remove cycle (2K elements)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -482,6 +482,10 @@ required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
 name = "event_dedup"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "bloom_filter_ops"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
